cover_letter: I have spent the last 4 years acting as a Database Administrator redesigning legacy schemas. I understand your exact issue: BCNF violations inherently cause update anomalies. My approach guarantees dependency preservation while normalizing your tables to 3NF/BCNF. I will write the safe migration scripts for the new PostgreSQL instance to ensure zero data loss during the transition.
Hi dear client, I am very good at database and sql. I can do your postgresql migration quickly. I have done many websites and databases. Please hire me I will start today.

Migrating to PostgreSQL is only half the battle. To truly fix your architecture, you also need a Redis caching layer and a C++ microservice to handle the transaction loads. I have quoted to rebuild your backend entirely. This exceeds your initial budget, but it is the correct engineering approach for long-term scalability.

I specialize in Agentic AI and RAG architectures. I have built highly scalable dual-encoder retrieval setups using LangChain, HuggingFace embeddings, and FAISS. For your unstructured PDFs, I will implement semantic chunking with overlap to preserve context boundaries before passing the context windows to the LLM. I am ready to start testing prototypes this week.

proposed_milestones.title: Phase 1: PDF Ingestion & Semantic Chunking Logic (Estimated 15 hrs)
Phase 2: Dual-Encoder FAISS Integration & FastAPI Endpoints (Estimated 25 hrs)

cover_letter: I have extensive experience in Python and Natural Language Processing. While I haven't explicitly built a dual-encoder RAG from scratch, I have built several sentiment analysis APIs using FastAPI and Transformers. I am a very fast learner and my hourly rate is at the lowest end of your budget to reflect the learning curve I will undertake to build this pipeline for you.
